description: Lecture discussing maximum flow algorithms, focusing on the push-relabel algorithm. It covers augmenting path algorithms, including Ford Fulkerson and Edmonds Karp, and introduces the push-relabel paradigm as a faster alternative.
topic_summary: The lecture explores maximum flow algorithms, particularly the push-relabel method, contrasting it with augmenting path algorithms like Ford Fulkerson and Edmonds Karp. It emphasizes the efficiency of push-relabel algorithms in practical applications [t=68:71].
